title: ColliderML detector bundle manifest
description: Schema for `detector.yaml` files inside a ColliderML detector bundle. The pipeline reads exactly this file per bundle; everything else is reached through paths declared here.

version.description: Bundle version. Independent of the upstream geometry version. Convention: ISO date or semver.

status.description: Maturity of the bundle. See top-level README for definitions.

upstream.description: URL of the upstream repository or release where the geometry comes from.

upstream_path.description: Path inside the upstream repo to the root compact XML (or equivalent).

upstream_revision.description: Git SHA, tag, or release ID pinning the upstream source.

license.description: License of the upstream geometry assets.

compact_xml.description: Path (relative to the bundle root) to the root DD4hep compact XML.

plugins.description: Names of DD4hep plugin libraries that must be loadable (via DD4HEP_LIBRARY_PATH or system loader) for the geometry to construct. Names only — not paths. Discovery is the runtime's responsibility.

extension_libs.description: Optional libraries that decorate the geometry with ACTS extensions, sensitive-detector wiring, or alignment hooks. Loaded after `plugins`.

tracking_config.description: Path to the ACTS tracking-geometry converter config (YAML or JSON).

tracking_builder.description: Which ACTS tracking-geometry builder to use. `dd4hep_auto` works for barrel+endcap collider detectors with proper ACTS extensions; `forward_custom` is required for forward spectrometers like LHCb; `external` means the bundle ships a Python entry point that returns a `TrackingGeometry`.

tracking_entry_point.description: Required when `tracking_builder = external`. Python `module:callable` returning a TrackingGeometry.

digi_config.description: Path to the ACTS digitization config JSON.

material_map.description: Optional path to a pre-computed ACTS material map ROOT file. Use null to assert that no map is bundled (forces ACTS to fall back to DD4hep-derived material).

ckf_config.description: Optional path to CKF / ambiguity-solver tuning.

type.description: How the magnetic field is supplied. `uniform_solenoid` uses `Bz_T`; `field_map` uses `map_file`; `multi_region` uses `regions`; `in_geometry` means the DD4hep compact XML defines it and no extra info is needed.

Bz_T.description: Solenoid field strength in tesla. Required when `type = uniform_solenoid`.

map_file.description: Path to a ROOT field map. Required when `type = field_map`.

regions.description: List of (region, type, parameters) entries. Required when `type = multi_region`.

integral_Tm.description: Integrated bending field along the beam direction, for documentation.

notes.description: Free-form notes about the field configuration (polarity, run-mode caveats, etc.).

cms_energy_GeV.description: Centre-of-mass energy or list of supported energies.

default_vertex_distribution.description: Default luminous-region size used by `merge_and_smear`. Per accelerator, not per detector — declared here for convenience.

default_pileup_mu.description: Suggested default pileup multiplicity for this machine.

acceptance.description: Detector acceptance in pseudorapidity. Used by the loader to refuse ill-defined runs (e.g. asking for full 4π parquet on LHCb).

simulation.description: Override default simulation pipeline. If absent, the standard ddsim → ACTS path is used.

output_mapping.description: Path to the schema mapping that translates DD4hep volume IDs to ColliderML parquet enums.

notes.description: Free-form caveats. Surfaced by the loader on first use.
